title: Missing CSP Header
executive_summary: VulScan identified a candidate requiring manual validation for missing browser hardening headers.
technical_summary: VulScan identified a candidate requiring manual validation. Content-Security-Policy header was not observed in supplied safe evidence.
business_impact: Browser-side defence in depth may be reduced if this header is missing.
technical_impact: The absence of CSP can reduce protection against certain content injection scenarios.
remediation: Harden security headers according to application context.
developer_guidance: Add an application-specific Content-Security-Policy and validate it in staging.
validation_guidance: Retest response headers for representative application routes.
limitations: Header absence requires context-aware manual validation.
safe_testing_statement: Authorised testing only. Redacted Evidence references are used.
